action.reasoning: First iteration: build baseline with CLIP ViT-B/16 fine-tuned with weighted cross-entropy on train, validate on OOD val, submit eval to measure iteration time and initial score. Start with 3 epochs (quick), batch_size 16 per GPU (total 64). Use DDP on 4 GPUs. Write model.py, train.py, predict.py. No extra packages.
